artifacts.title: avatar-presenter-pack-v0.1.md
artifacts.snippet: # Avatar Presenter Script Pack v0.1 All scripts are draft review required. Publish allowed: false. ## 1. MarketOps Overview Presenter Script Production notes: Corporate studio setting, dashboard background, polished officewear, professional presenter framing. Script: Welcome to MarketOps, a paper-simulation research lab for AI-assisted market research. The current system runs fake-money sample-data loops, refreshes a public-safe dashboard, and writes draft reports for human review. Nothing here is real performance, and nothing here is financial advice. The goal is simple: build the operating discipline before any possible future launch. ## 2. Risk Desk Presenter Script Production notes: Dash

Not real performance. Not financial advice. ## Monthly-Style Recap This draft uses the current available paper-simulation sample data as a monthly-style review. It is not a full calendar-month performance record. The point is to test the format MarketOps will use when the paper lab has more history. ## Dashboard Recap - Vehicles scanned: 8 - Signals reviewed: 8 - Risk approved: 0 - Risk blocked: 8 - Fake paper trades: 0 - Ending paper equity: $10,000.00 - Paper P/L:

artifacts.title: weekly-marketops-field-report-v0.1.md
artifacts.snippet: # Weekly MarketOps Field Report Draft v0.1 Status: draft review required Publish allowed: false Mode: paper_simulation Safety label: paper simulation, fake money, sample-data preview Paper simulation and sample-data preview only. Not real performance. Not financial advice. ## Plain-English Summary MarketOps completed another local paper-simulation loop. The system scanned 8 sample vehicles, reviewed 8 sample signals, approved 0 for fake paper execution, and blocked 8 at the Risk Desk. This is not a claim about real performance. It is a controlled sample-data rehearsal for the operating process: scan, risk review, fake execution, dashboard refresh, report drafting, and human review. ## Perfor

The event is selected from public-safe dashboard data only, without raw internal IDs, exact sizing, or private execution details. ## Context MarketOps reviewed a small basket of sample vehicles. The Risk Desk approved a limited number of events for fake paper execution and blocked the rest. This event became notable because it produced a positive paper P/L

artifacts.title: faceless-video-pack-v0.1.md
artifacts.snippet: # Faceless Video Script Pack v0.1 All scripts are draft review required. Publish allowed: false. ## 1. First Paper Simulation Loop Hook: MarketOps is not trading real money. It is rehearsing the operating system first. Scene beats: - Show a dark dashboard opening on paper simulation mode. - Cut to stats: 8 vehicles scanned, 8 signals reviewed. - Show Risk Desk counts: 0 approved, 8 blocked. - End on review queue and compliance gate. Chart/visual suggestions: - Paper equity curve - Signal funnel - Draft queue cards On-screen captions: - Paper simulation only - Fake/sample money - Not real performance - Human review required CTA: Follow the MarketOps lab as the sample-data system gets stricter

complianceReport.snippet: # MarketOps Content Compliance Report v0.1 Status: passed Generated at: 2026-05-13T20:42:22.287Z Publish allowed: false ## Scope This report checks generated MarketOps content drafts, queue records, and public-facing content packs. Drafts remain local, review-gated, and disabled for publishing. ## Scan Result No restricted terms were found in generated draft content. ## Checks - PASS: Config mode is paper_simulation - PASS: allowBrokerConnection is false - PASS: allowLiveTrading is false - PASS: allowSmsAlerts is false - PASS: allowSubscriberSignals is false - PASS: Required script exists: office:content - PASS: Required script exists: office:queue - PASS: Required script exists: office:qa - PASS: Required script exists: office:run - PASS: Required content folder exists: content - PASS: Required content folder exists: blogs - PASS: Required content folder exists: reports - PASS: Required

reviews.monthlyBriefSnippet: # Monthly Human Review Brief v0.1 reviewCadence: biweekly_digest humanReviewRequired: true autoApplyAllowed: false ## Top 5 Improvement Proposals - PROP-COORD-001: Add run health trend summary (review_next_digest) - PROP-COORD-002: Add digest due calculation (review_next_digest) - PROP-DATA-001: Expand sample history depth (review_next_digest) - PROP-DATA-002: Add stale sample warning (review_next_digest) - PROP-SIGNAL-001: Explain candidate filter outcomes (review_next_digest) ## Biggest Recurring Weaknesses - Sample data depth is still limited. - Trend review needs more history. - Daily output needs digest throttling to avoid burden. ## Strongest Performing Areas - Paper-only guardrails remain intact. - Content queue stays review-gated. - Compliance scan passed before agent review. ## Riskiest Behaviors Observed - Review fatigue from too many routine daily items. - Overinterpreting sample-data paper results. - Promoting draft content before human review. ## Content Quality Concerns - Draft length bands need tuning. - Platform intent labels would make social review faster. ## Compli

proposals.title: Explain candidate filter outcomes
proposals.problemObserved: Signals are summarized by count, but the human reviewer cannot quickly see why most events were filtered.
proposals.proposedChange: Add a public-safe reason summary by outcome bucket, avoiding exact formulas.
proposals.requiredValidation: Compliance review for wording plus paper-only output validation.

proposals.title: Add false signal audit notes
proposals.problemObserved: The signal layer does not yet separate noisy candidates from potentially useful misses.
proposals.proposedChange: Create a review-only false-signal note field for paper experiments.
proposals.requiredValidation: Staff Writer and compliance review before any public summary.

proposals.title: Track block reason themes
proposals.problemObserved: Risk blocks are counted, but recurring themes are not summarized for digest review.
proposals.proposedChange: Group high-level block themes into a review-only summary.
proposals.requiredValidation: QA should verify that no private rule details are exposed.

proposals.title: Add risk override request template
proposals.problemObserved: There is no structured way for a human to request a paper-only risk experiment.
proposals.proposedChange: Create a template that requires hypothesis, paper validation, and approval before any rule change.
proposals.requiredValidation: QA must verify autoApplyAllowed remains false.

proposals.title: Expand sample history depth
proposals.problemObserved: The current sample dataset is enough for a smoke test but too small for richer pattern review.
proposals.proposedChange: Add more deterministic sample bars for the same public-safe vehicle set, labeled as sample data.
proposals.requiredValidation: QA must verify sample labels and public disclaimers before use.

proposals.title: Add stale sample warning
proposals.problemObserved: The system can run repeatedly against unchanged sample data.
proposals.proposedChange: Add an internal warning when repeated runs use the same sample snapshot.
proposals.requiredValidation: Paper run comparison plus QA validation of warning copy.

proposals.title: Add execution quality notes
proposals.problemObserved: Paper events show outcomes, but not enough review context about simulated execution quality.
proposals.proposedChange: Add high-level notes about timing assumptions and sample limitations.
proposals.requiredValidation: Paper QA should check for concise, public-safe wording.

proposals.title: Add rolling paper metrics
proposals.problemObserved: The dashboard shows current run metrics but limited rolling comparison.
proposals.proposedChange: Add a rolling paper-only view using internal history summaries.
proposals.requiredValidation: Require sample-size warning and compliance review.

proposals.title: Tighten draft length bands
proposals.problemObserved: Generated drafts are safe, but length and density may vary by run.
proposals.proposedChange: Add target length ranges for weekly, monthly, and case study drafts.
proposals.requiredValidation: Manual review against the next three draft cycles.

proposals.title: Add platform intent labels
proposals.problemObserved: Social drafts are safe, but they do not clearly label whether a post is educational, build log, or dashboard update.
proposals.proposedChange: Add intent labels to each draft record.
proposals.requiredValidation: QA should verify labels are descriptive and not promotional claims.

proposals.title: Add chart asset checklist
proposals.problemObserved: Video scripts suggest visuals, but do not list exactly which safe chart image should be captured.
proposals.proposedChange: Add a review-only checklist for dashboard captures and captions.
proposals.requiredValidation: Human approval before using any asset publicly.

proposals.title: Add package scoring rubric
proposals.problemObserved: Video production packets exist, but the office does not yet rank which concepts are most worth producing first.
proposals.proposedChange: Add a review-only scoring rubric for clarity, compliance, visual feasibility, and platform fit.
proposals.requiredValidation: QA must verify publishAllowed remains false and every score is advisory only.

proposals.title: Add safe asset dependency checklist
proposals.problemObserved: Packages list shots and B-roll ideas, but not whether each needed asset already exists locally.
proposals.proposedChange: Add a local asset checklist that marks dashboard capture, thumbnail, avatar read, and captions as missing/ready/rejected.
proposals.requiredValidation: Run against local folders only and keep all items draft_review_required.

proposals.title: Add presenter compliance preface
proposals.problemObserved: Presenter scripts include disclaimers, but the opening frame could be clearer.
proposals.proposedChange: Add a short first-line compliance preface for presenter drafts.
proposals.requiredValidation: Staff Writer review for tone and clarity.

proposals.title: Expand review folder scan
proposals.problemObserved: Office compliance scans generated content, while agent QA scans review output separately.
proposals.proposedChange: Keep review-output scanning as a separate QA gate and add summary counts to the digest.
proposals.requiredValidation: Compare office QA and agent QA outputs for consistency.

proposals.title: Add urgent issue routing
proposals.problemObserved: The new cadence defers routine items, but urgent safety issues need a distinct path.
proposals.proposedChange: Reserve urgent_human_review for compliance failure, safety risk, or system failure only.
proposals.requiredValidation: QA should verify routine proposals default to review_next_digest.

proposals.title: Add run health trend summary
proposals.problemObserved: The office run records pass/fail state, but the human view does not yet show trend quality across multiple runs.
proposals.proposedChange: Create a paper-only trend summary that compares recent run status, content count, and QA state across the last several internal observations.
proposals.requiredValidation: Paper test against archived observations, then QA checks for missing or stale run fields.

proposals.title: Add digest due calculation
proposals.problemObserved: The digest cadence is documented, but the due/not-due decision is still simple.
proposals.proposedChange: Add a deterministic cadence helper that marks whether the next biweekly digest is due, without creating extra human queue burden on routine runs.
proposals.requiredValidation: Unit-style paper test with fixed dates and QA checks for cadence fields.

deferredItems.title: Add safe asset dependency checklist
deferredItems.problemObserved: Packages list shots and B-roll ideas, but not whether each needed asset already exists locally.
deferredItems.proposedChange: Add a local asset checklist that marks dashboard capture, thumbnail, avatar read, and captions as missing/ready/rejected.
deferredItems.requiredValidation: Run against local folders only and keep all items draft_review_required.

deferredItems.title: Add presenter compliance preface
deferredItems.problemObserved: Presenter scripts include disclaimers, but the opening frame could be clearer.
deferredItems.proposedChange: Add a short first-line compliance preface for presenter drafts.
deferredItems.requiredValidation: Staff Writer review for tone and clarity.

deferredItems.title: Expand review folder scan
deferredItems.problemObserved: Office compliance scans generated content, while agent QA scans review output separately.
deferredItems.proposedChange: Keep review-output scanning as a separate QA gate and add summary counts to the digest.
deferredItems.requiredValidation: Compare office QA and agent QA outputs for consistency.

deferredItems.title: Add urgent issue routing
deferredItems.problemObserved: The new cadence defers routine items, but urgent safety issues need a distinct path.
deferredItems.proposedChange: Reserve urgent_human_review for compliance failure, safety risk, or system failure only.
deferredItems.requiredValidation: QA should verify routine proposals default to review_next_digest.

deferredItems.title: Add run health trend summary
deferredItems.problemObserved: The office run records pass/fail state, but the human view does not yet show trend quality across multiple runs.
deferredItems.proposedChange: Create a paper-only trend summary that compares recent run status, content count, and QA state across the last several internal observations.
deferredItems.requiredValidation: Paper test against archived observations, then QA checks for missing or stale run fields.

deferredItems.title: Add digest due calculation
deferredItems.problemObserved: The digest cadence is documented, but the due/not-due decision is still simple.
deferredItems.proposedChange: Add a deterministic cadence helper that marks whether the next biweekly digest is due, without creating extra human queue burden on routine runs.
deferredItems.requiredValidation: Unit-style paper test with fixed dates and QA checks for cadence fields.
